note: GRNBoost2 and GENIE3-style classical baselines for GRN edge prediction

grnboost2.note: GRNBoost2 requires many cells; only 11 pseudo-cells available (n_samples=11 << n_features=2000). Skipping to avoid degenerate/infeasible computation.
grnboost2.note_detail: GRNBoost2 is designed for single-cell matrices with thousands of cells. With only 11 pseudo-cell-type profiles (n_samples << n_genes=2000), gradient-boosted tree models are degenerate and computation is infeasible.

random_forest_genie3_style.note: RandomForestClassifier(n=200) on 22-dim [tf_expr|gene_expr] features; trained on training split (GENIE3-style concatenated expression)
